examples: It's very difficult to demote somebody who has been filling in during maternity leave.
It is illegal to demote an employee without reason.
"We are going to demote the PC to just be a device," Steve Jobs said.
Robinson took the decision to demote Ally Hogg to vice-captain after Blair's impressive leadership on Scotland duty.
Likewise, your manager might give you a test challenge to reconfirm her decision to demote or fire you.
